name: Phase 4 project lifecycle and work management requirements matrix

evidence: packages/project-core exports createProcessTemplate and createProcessTemplateVersionSnapshot for tenant-owned ProcessTemplate/StageTemplate with stable keys, labels, ordering, active/version metadata, nested artifact/approval/task templates, and detached version snapshots

packages/tenant-config exports createProcessTemplateConfigurationRef and createProcessTemplateConfigurationRegistry so tenant configuration can register active versioned process-template references without duplicating project-core runtime structures

Validation rejects duplicate stage ids/keys/sort orders, duplicate nested artifact/approval/task keys, duplicate default participant role keys, tenant mismatches, invalid stable keys, empty stages, invalid timestamps, and invalid versions

evidence: packages/project-core exports ManagedProject, ProjectStage, ProjectStageHistoryEntry, lifecycle status/transition types, createManagedProjectFromDraft, getAllowedProjectLifecycleTransitions, and advanceManagedProjectLifecycle

createManagedProjectFromDraft converts a Phase 3 ProjectDraft plus matching active ProcessTemplate into an active ManagedProject with deterministic active stage ordering, currentStageId, process-template version snapshot, source draft/opportunity trace, and initial stage history

advanceManagedProjectLifecycle is immutable: allowed transitions advance_stage, complete_project, and cancel_project create new project state and append stage history; invalid tenant/current-stage/lifecycle/transition attempts return typed errors and leave input state unchanged

Bug Hunt and code review findings were fixed: malformed runtime transitions return invalid_transition typed errors, contradictory project/stage state and skipped earlier stages are rejected, backdated transitions are rejected, malformed nested process snapshots are validated without raw TypeError, and workflow-engine declares its project-core workspace dependency

packages/workflow-engine exports evaluateProjectLifecycleTransition and verifies integration with project-core state without introducing API route behavior; apps/api lifecycle endpoints remain P4-007 scope

rows.requirement: Stage gates, artifacts, and approval basics
evidence: packages/project-core exports ProjectArtifact, ApprovalRequest, StageGateEvaluation, StageGateBlocker, recordProjectArtifactEvidence, createStageApprovalRequest, approveStageApprovalRequest, and evaluateStageGate

Required artifact templates are satisfied only by accepted ProjectArtifact evidence matching tenant, project, stage, template id/key, and process-template snapshot; cross-stage or unknown-template evidence is rejected before gate evaluation
Required approval templates are satisfied only by approved ApprovalRequest records matching tenant, project, stage, template id/key, and approver role from the process-template snapshot

advanceManagedProjectLifecycle blocks advance_stage and complete_project when evaluateStageGate returns blockers; blocker codes are stable and messages are Russian UI-safe: missing_required_artifact and required_approval_not_approved

Bug Hunt and code review findings were fixed: artifact/approval snapshot items are strictly validated, gate evidence must match templateVersion, impossible transitions return transition_not_allowed before gate checks, and artifact/approval commands reject inactive stages plus backdated evidence/decisions
packages/workflow-engine exports evaluateProjectStageGate as the workflow validation boundary; apps/api routes, persisted audit, UI, fixtures, and E2E remain P4-007/P4-009/P4-008 scope

rows.requirement: Canonical task model and task templates
evidence: packages/project-core exports Task, TaskStatus, TaskSourceTemplateSnapshot, createTaskFromStageTaskTemplate, and listProjectTasks for one canonical tenant/project/stage-owned task model

createTaskFromStageTaskTemplate creates immutable ManagedProject.tasks entries from StageTaskTemplate snapshots with dueDate, plannedWorkHours, status, sourceTemplate process/stage/task template version trace, createdBy/createdAt/updatedAt/correlationId, and no Kanban/Gantt-specific task ids
listProjectTasks returns cloned canonical tasks so view projections cannot mutate ManagedProject.tasks or create view-specific task copies

Bug Hunt and code review findings were fixed: persisted task sourceTemplate must match process/stage/task snapshot versions, task updatedAt cannot precede createdAt, stage template snapshot lookup includes version, and persisted taskTemplate snapshots reject duplicate ids/keys/default participant role keys

evidence: packages/project-core exports TaskParticipantRole, TaskParticipant, addTaskParticipant, listTaskParticipants, and listTasksByParticipant for role-based task participation over the canonical Task model

Task participants are tenant/project/stage/task-owned relations, not alternate task entities; addTaskParticipant is immutable and deduplicates assignments by taskId, role, and userId while allowing one user to hold multiple roles
Relation queries filter by tenant, task, user, and participant roles, return cloned participant/task data, and support executor, co_executor, requester, controller, approver, and observer roles

packages/access-control exports TASK_PARTICIPANT_READ_PERMISSION, TASK_PARTICIPANT_MANAGE_PERMISSION, and createTaskParticipantPolicyTarget so own-scope and project-scope participant access can be evaluated by the existing policy evaluator

Bug Hunt and code review findings were fixed: relation projections are cloned, malformed persisted participants are rejected before query, task/participant timestamps cannot exceed project.updatedAt, and project.updatedAt cannot precede project.createdAt
apps/api task participant routes remain P4-007 scope; P4-005 includes domain/access-control package integration evidence only

evidence: packages/project-core exports TaskComment, TaskStatusHistoryEntry, addTaskComment, changeTaskStatus, listTaskComments, and listTaskStatusHistory for append-only task activity

addTaskComment appends tenant/project/stage/task-owned comments with authorId, createdAt, body, and correlationId; it updates project.updatedAt without mutating canonical task status or task.updatedAt
changeTaskStatus updates the canonical Task.status and task.updatedAt while appending TaskStatusHistoryEntry with fromStatus, toStatus, actorId, changedAt, and correlationId
Readback helpers filter by tenant/task/author/actor and return cloned comments/status history so projections cannot mutate project state

Bug Hunt and code review findings were fixed: persisted comments and status history reject malformed tenant/project/task/stage links, duplicate ids, stale/future timestamps, non-changing status entries, broken status chains, final status mismatch, and reordered append-only logs both within one task and across tasks
apps/api task comment/status routes remain P4-007 scope; P4-006 includes project-core domain evidence only

rows.requirement: Project lifecycle and work API endpoints
evidence: apps/api exports Phase 4 in-memory runtime and routes for POST /api/projects/from-template, GET /api/projects/:id, stage transition, artifact evidence, approval evidence, project task create/list, task status, task comments, GET /api/my/tasks, GET /api/kanban/projects/:projectId, and existing GET /api/audit target filtering
P4-007 DTO schemas validate project/template/task/status/comment/participant request shapes at the API boundary with stable English response fields and Russian-safe error messages

State-changing routes enforce server-side tenant/session permissions, write audit events for managed-project creation, lifecycle transitions, artifact/approval evidence, task creation, task status changes, and task comments, and preserve canonical project/task IDs across project, My Tasks, and Kanban projections

Review fixes verified: project storage is tenant-scoped so equal projectId values do not leak across tenants, bare /api/tasks/:taskId routes are protected by tenant-wide task ID uniqueness, task status writes require executor/co_executor relation for non-manager/admin users, and task participant userIds must exist inside the actor tenant
P4-007 intentionally provides API integration coverage only; UI and real browser E2E evidence for E2E-030..034 remain P4-008/P4-009/P4-010 scope
